_note: Murphy-internal integration profile. Generated by SandboxQuarantine documentation adapter. Do NOT copy third-party docs verbatim.
capabilities: Egocentric video understanding from robot/agent perspective
Object localization and area localization with bounding-box output
Grasp pose estimation for robotic manipulation
Long-horizon task planning with streaming output
Multi-task embodied intelligence in a single model
Support for dense (2B, 8B) and MoE (30B-A3B) model architectures
Fine-tuned specialised variants: Plan, Nav, CoP

api_surface.name: model_loading
api_surface.description: Load RynnBrain model and processor from HuggingFace
api_surface.notes: Pinned to commit 4e694f27d5a23b3c3b487be1a97e708c15cb9fd4. No trust_remote_code required.

api_surface.name: processor_loading
api_surface.notes: Handles both text and image inputs

api_surface.name: inference
api_surface.description: Run inference with a conversation payload
api_surface.notes: Input must be formatted as a conversation JSON (see data_formats)

api_surface.name: streaming_inference
api_surface.notes: Use TextIteratorStreamer for streaming planning output

conversation_json.description: Standard conversation format used for all inference tasks
conversation_json.notes: role can be 'user' or 'assistant'. Content is a list of typed blocks.

planning_streaming_format.description: Streamed output format for planning tasks (CoT steps)
planning_streaming_format.notes: Output is streamed token-by-token; parse final JSON when stream ends.

navigation_trajectory_format.description: Output format for VLN / navigation tasks
navigation_trajectory_format.notes: Positions are in metric space. heading in degrees.

bounding_box_output_format.description: Object localisation output embedded in model text output
bounding_box_output_format.notes: Coordinates are pixel values in the original image space. Parse with regex: r'<(\S+)>\s*\((\d+),(\d+)\),\s*\((\d+),(\d+)\)\s*</\S+>'

model_variants.name: RynnBrain-Plan
model_variants.use_case: Long-horizon task planning with streaming CoT

hardware_requirements: CUDA-capable GPU required for inference (CPU fallback is very slow)
Recommended: NVIDIA A100 / H100 / RTX 4090 or better
Minimum VRAM: 8GB for 2B model (bfloat16), 24GB for 8B, 48GB+ for 30B
device_map='auto' will shard across available GPUs automatically

attribution.attribution_notice: This integration uses RynnBrain, an embodied AI model by Alibaba DAMO Academy, licensed under the Apache 2.0 License. See https://github.com/alibaba-damo-academy/RynnBrain for the original source and license text.
